reviews.review_title: Needs some work but could be really fun!
reviews.review_description:
I played for a little while, it is ok but needs some work to be really fun. There is no movement or turning. No music.
You work through each day serving customers their grocery orders from a stationary position, and taking payments that go into the cash register. You need to buy in supplies, sort your shelves, and upgrade some equipment around the store such as a fridge or safe and at the end of each day, pay your rent.
Unfortunately, I ran into problems on the second day. Even though I was giving the customers the correct items it was saying one item was incorrect. 
The game is quite basic and very minimal at the moment. I can see this being a lot more fun and engaging if it has some more features and mechanics.
